scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet stands up from his prayer, looking hopeful and confident that Allah will answer his prayer.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet stands up, with a look of hope and confidence.

schema_output.scene_summary: The Prophet stands up from his prayer, looking hopeful and confident that Allah will answer his prayer.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 317
schema_output.moral_lesson: Trust in Allah's mercy and justice

characters.name: The central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet stood up from his prayer, feeling hopeful that Allah would answer his prayer. He looked out at the beautiful landscape, trusting in Allah's mercy and justice.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A rugged mountainous terrain overlooking Thaqīf in the background, with a few sparse trees and rocky outcroppings. A lone figure stands on a rocky outcropping in the foreground, seen from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. The central figure stands with their back to the viewer, looking out at the landscape with a hopeful and confident expression. The sun shines down on them from a warm blue sky, casting a gentle glow over the entire scene. Soft warm golden light, peaceful and serene mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Earthy, sandy, and turquoise palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. In the distance, a few scattered trees and rocky outcroppings blend into the mountainous terrain. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
